  "text": "The Kubernetes API server admission controller pipeline is implemented primarily in staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/ and its subdirectories.\n\n## 1. admission.Interface Registration\n\nThe core interface is defined in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/interfaces.go`, which declares `Interface`, `MutationInterface`, `ValidationInterface`, and `PluginInitializer`. Plugin registration is managed via the `Plugins` struct in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugins.go`, which provides `Register()` to add named factory functions and `NewFromPlugins()` to instantiate the ordered chain. The generic apiserver registers plugins via `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go` (RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins), and the kube-apiserver adds all kube-specific plugins in `pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go` (RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins) and configures options in `pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go`.\n\n## 2. Generic Admission Chain Execution\n\n`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/chain.go` implements `chainAdmissionHandler`, which iterates over all registered handlers and invokes `Admit()` (for MutationInterface) and then `Validate()` (for ValidationInterface) on each. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/reinvocation.go` wraps the chain in a `reinvoker` that re-invokes the chain when webhooks request it. Metrics instrumentation is in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/metrics/metrics.go` which wraps each plugin call. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/audit.go` provides audit decoration. Initializers for plugins are in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/initializer/` and `pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/`.\n\n## 3. Mutating Admission Ordering\n\nThe MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go`) implements `MutationInterface` and uses `dispatcher.go` to call mutating webhooks in order, with re-invocation support via `reinvocationcontext.go`. The CEL-based MutatingAdmissionPolicy plugin (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/plugin.go`) works similarly, with its dispatcher, reinvocation context, and patch types. The generic policy plugin infrastructure in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/generic/` is shared between mutating and validating policy plugins.\n\n## 4. Validating Admission Webhook Call\n\nThe ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go`) implements `ValidationInterface` and calls webhooks via `dispatcher.go`. The CEL-based ValidatingAdmissionPolicy plugin (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/plugin.go`) evaluates CEL expressions against the object. Configuration for both is managed via `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/`, with `mutating_webhook_manager.go` and `validating_webhook_manager.go` maintaining live webhook configurations. The shared webhook infrastructure (request building, match conditions, etc.) lives under `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/`."
}

  "text": "The Kubernetes API server admission controller pipeline is implemented primarily in staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/ and its subdirectories.\n\n## 1. admission.Interface Registration\n\nThe core interface is defined in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/interfaces.go`, which declares `Interface`, `MutationInterface`, `ValidationInterface`, and `PluginInitializer`. Plugin registration is managed via the `Plugins` struct in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugins.go`, which provides `Register()` to add named factory functions and `NewFromPlugins()` to instantiate the ordered chain. The generic apiserver registers plugins via `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/plugins.go` (RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins), and the kube-apiserver adds all kube-specific plugins in `pkg/kubeapiserver/options/plugins.go` (RegisterAllAdmissionPlugins) and configures options in `pkg/kubeapiserver/options/admission.go`.\n\n## 2. Generic Admission Chain Execution\n\n`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/chain.go` implements `chainAdmissionHandler`, which iterates over all registered handlers and invokes `Admit()` (for MutationInterface) and then `Validate()` (for ValidationInterface) on each. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/reinvocation.go` wraps the chain in a `reinvoker` that re-invokes the chain when webhooks request it. Metrics instrumentation is in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/metrics/metrics.go` which wraps each plugin call. `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/audit.go` provides audit decoration. Initializers for plugins are in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/initializer/` and `pkg/kubeapiserver/admission/`.\n\n## 3. Mutating Admission Ordering\n\nThe MutatingAdmissionWebhook plugin (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/plugin.go`) implements `MutationInterface` and uses `dispatcher.go` to call mutating webhooks in order, with re-invocation support via `reinvocationcontext.go`. The CEL-based MutatingAdmissionPolicy plugin (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/mutating/plugin.go`) works similarly, with its dispatcher, reinvocation context, and patch types. The generic policy plugin infrastructure in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/generic/` is shared between mutating and validating policy plugins.\n\n## 4. Validating Admission Webhook Call\n\nThe ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugin (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/plugin.go`) implements `ValidationInterface` and calls webhooks via `dispatcher.go`. The CEL-based ValidatingAdmissionPolicy plugin (`staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/policy/validating/plugin.go`) evaluates CEL expressions against the object. Configuration for both is managed via `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/`, with `mutating_webhook_manager.go` and `validating_webhook_manager.go` maintaining live webhook configurations. The shared webhook infrastructure (request building, match conditions, etc.) lives under `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/`."
